problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site may resolve What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? by blocking at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
